# BERVOS - Full Ecosystem Reference

> This document provides complete structured information about BERVOS, its projects, and open source packages for AI agents and LLMs.

## Creator Profile
- **Name**: Bernardo Lares
- **Role**: Software Engineer, Data Scientist, and Digital Architect
- **GitHub**: https://github.com/laresbernardo
- **LinkedIn**: https://linkedin.com/in/laresbernardo
- **Email**: laresbernardo@gmail.com

## Brand Philosophy & Naming
The name **BERVOS** represents three distinct architectural layers of the ecosystem:
1. **Action Angle (Ber + Verbos)**: In Spanish, *verbos* means verbs (actions). BERVOS signifies digital tools engineered to execute, optimize, and drive tangible results rather than serve as passive portfolios.
2. **Enterprise System (B.E.R.V.O.S.)**: Business Effectiveness & Resource Visualization Optimization System. An analytical blueprint for structuring high-impact assets.
3. **Client-Centric (Ber-Vos)**: Derived from the Spanish pronoun *vos* (you), meaning 'Ber for You'—indicating hyper-personalized solutions tailored to the end-user.

## Ecosystem Projects (Production Apps)

### Billio
- **Deployment URL**: [https://billio.bervos.org/](https://billio.bervos.org/)
- **Category**: Productivity (FinanceApplication)
- **Tags**: Finance, Travel, Collaboration, Investment
- **Description**: Collaborative multi-currency and AI-powered Financial Management operating system for families.

### Chessverse
- **Deployment URL**: [https://chessverse.bervos.org/](https://chessverse.bervos.org/)
- **Category**: Leisure (GameApplication)
- **Tags**: Chess, Puzzles, Openings, Practice, PWA
- **Description**: Modern platform to practice chess openings and thousands of puzzles, tracking performance, and available offline.

### tripitdown
- **Deployment URL**: [https://tripitdown.bervos.org/](https://tripitdown.bervos.org/)
- **Category**: Productivity (TravelApplication)
- **Tags**: Itinerary, Travel, Maps, Collaboration, PWA
- **Description**: Precision-focused and customizable travel itinerary tool powered by local-guides AI Agents with versions management.

### Aura
- **Deployment URL**: [https://aura.bervos.org/](https://aura.bervos.org/)
- **Category**: Productivity (UtilitiesApplication)
- **Tags**: macOS, SwiftUI, Music, Photos, Analytics
- **Description**: Beautiful free macOS dashboard app turning your Music and Photos libraries into offline, private visual analytics.

### Scribo
- **Deployment URL**: [https://scribo.bervos.org/](https://scribo.bervos.org/)
- **Category**: Leisure (EducationalApplication)
- **Tags**: Languages, Practice, PWA
- **Description**: Master Arabic and Japanese characters and kanas through immersive practice and historical accuracy results.

### LaresDJ
- **Deployment URL**: [https://laresdj.bervos.org/](https://laresdj.bervos.org/)
- **Category**: Leisure (SocialNetworkingApplication)
- **Tags**: DJ, Production, Music, Community
- **Description**: The ultimate virtual community and resource hub for DJs and music producers, offering tutorials, community forums, equipment maps, custom skins, and curated download packs.

### Pinmage
- **Deployment URL**: [https://pinmage.bervos.org/](https://pinmage.bervos.org/)
- **Category**: Productivity (UtilitiesApplication)
- **Tags**: AI, Photos, Metadata, EXIF, macOS
- **Description**: Analyzes scanned photo albums or individual photos using AI to deduce dates and places, writing them directly into native EXIF & GPS image metadata.

### Tonaly
- **Deployment URL**: [https://tonaly.bervos.org/](https://tonaly.bervos.org/)
- **Category**: Leisure (EducationalApplication)
- **Tags**: Music, Audio, Practice, PWA
- **Description**: Immersive ear training studio designed for musicians and audiophiles. Develop absolute note recognition, master relative intervals, and unlock deep performance insights.

### YT2MP3
- **Deployment URL**: [https://github.com/laresbernardo/YT2MP3](https://github.com/laresbernardo/YT2MP3)
- **Category**: Productivity (UtilitiesApplication)
- **Tags**: Chrome, Extension, Audio, YouTube, Automation
- **Description**: Lightweight Chrome Extension and Node.js server to download YouTube audio as high-quality MP3 with automatic iTunes metadata and high-res covers.

## Open Source Software
### Robyn
- **Repository**: [https://github.com/facebookexperimental/Robyn](https://github.com/facebookexperimental/Robyn)
- **Description**: Marketing Mix Modeling (MMM) by Meta Marketing Science.
- **Initial Metrics**: Stars: 1.5k, Forks: 430, Downloads: 137k, Contributors: 33

### lares
- **Repository**: [https://github.com/laresbernardo/lares](https://github.com/laresbernardo/lares)
- **Description**: R package for data science, analytics, and business intelligence.
- **Initial Metrics**: Stars: 240, Forks: 50, Downloads: 213k, Contributors: 6

## Technology Stack & Infrastructure
- **Frontend**: React 19, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, Vite
- **Motion**: Framer Motion
- **Icons**: Lucide React & React Icons
- **Hosting & Analytics**: Firebase, Google Analytics (GTag), Formspree for forms
